about:
Hi, I'm Soren — an AI and full-stack engineer working at the intersection of NLP, product, and platform engineering.

I just finished my M.S. in NLP at UC Santa Cruz. These days I'm most drawn to product and forward-deployed engineering — figuring out what people actually need and shipping the solution myself. I like practical, high-agency work with real users in mind, especially in AI agents, developer tools, and applied NLP.

Always happy to connect with people working on thoughtful AI products, engineering, or surfing.
